# Random Pokemon Generator
> Free online tool for generating random Pokemon teams for Nuzlocke challenges, Draft Leagues, and casual play.

## URL
https://www.randompokemon.co

## About
Random Pokemon Generator is a free, web-based tool that lets users instantly generate random Pokemon teams from all 1,025 Pokemon across Generations 1-9 (Kanto through Paldea). No signup required.

## Core Features
- Generate random teams of 1-6 Pokemon instantly
- Filter by Type (18 types), Region (9 regions), Rarity (Legendary/Mythical/Ultra Beast/Paradox/Sub-Legendary), Evolution Stage, Gender, Nature, and Form
- Search any Pokemon by name with autocomplete
- Save and load teams locally
- Share teams with friends
- Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile
- Progressive Web App (PWA) support for offline use
- Fully accessible and responsive design

## Use Cases
- **Nuzlocke Challenges**: Generate rule-compliant teams for hardcore challenge runs
- **Draft Leagues**: Pick random teams for competitive draft formats
- **Randomizer Runs**: Create surprise teams for blind playthroughs
- **Casual Play**: Discover new Pokemon and team combinations
- **Soul Link**: Generate partner teams for cooperative Nuzlocke runs

## Specialized Generators
- Shiny Pokemon Generator: https://www.randompokemon.co/shiny-pokemon-generator
- Legendary Pokemon Generator: https://www.randompokemon.co/legendary-pokemon-generator
- Starter Pokemon Generator: https://www.randompokemon.co/starter-pokemon-generator
- Nuzlocke Generator: https://www.randompokemon.co/nuzlocke-generator
- Draft League Generator: https://www.randompokemon.co/draft-league-generator

## Region-Specific Generators
- Paldea (Gen 9): https://www.randompokemon.co/paldea-pokemon-generator
- Galar (Gen 8): https://www.randompokemon.co/galar-pokemon-generator
- Alola (Gen 7): https://www.randompokemon.co/alola-pokemon-generator
- Kalos (Gen 6): https://www.randompokemon.co/kalos-pokemon-generator
- Hoenn (Gen 3): https://www.randompokemon.co/hoenn-pokemon-generator
- Kanto (Gen 1): https://www.randompokemon.co/kanto-pokemon-generator

## Guides & Resources
- Nuzlocke Rules Guide: https://www.randompokemon.co/guide
- Complete Pokedex: https://www.randompokemon.co/pokedex

## Technical Details
- Built with Next.js and React
- Data sourced from PokeAPI (1,025 Pokemon)
- Optimized for Core Web Vitals
- Server-side rendered for SEO
- PWA with offline caching via Service Worker

## FAQ
Q: Does this include Gen 9 Pokemon?
A: Yes. All 1,025 Pokemon through Generation 9 including Scarlet & Violet DLC.

Q: Is this free?
A: 100% free, no ads, no signup required.

Q: Does it work on mobile?
A: Yes. Fully responsive and optimized for phones and tablets.

Q: Can I exclude Legendary Pokemon?
A: Yes. Use the Rarity filter to control which categories appear.

## Contact
Website: https://www.randompokemon.co
